description_for_human: Live Azure DevOps dashboard: work items, PRs, and pipeline runs for MetaOS.
description_for_model: Interactive Azure DevOps command center. Use show_engineering_dashboard to render a live dashboard of the signed-in user's active work items, pull requests awaiting review, and recent pipeline runs. Use connect_azure_devops when the user provides an org and PAT to enable live data. Use disconnect_azure_devops to clear stored credentials and return to demo mode. The widget itself contains a Connect form, so calling show_engineering_dashboard is enough — connect/disconnect are also reachable from the widget UI via callServerTool.

functions.name: show_engineering_dashboard
functions.description: Render the interactive Engineering Command Center dashboard: the user's active work items, pull requests awaiting review, and recent pipeline runs. If no PAT is configured, shows a Connect form inside the widget.

functions.name: connect_azure_devops
functions.description: Validate and store an Azure DevOps Personal Access Token to enable live data in the dashboard.

functions.name: disconnect_azure_devops
functions.description: Clear the stored Azure DevOps credentials so the dashboard returns to demo mode.

tools.name: show_engineering_dashboard
tools.title: Show Engineering Command Center
tools.description: Render the interactive Engineering Command Center dashboard: the user's active work items, pull requests awaiting review, and recent pipeline runs. If no PAT is configured, shows a Connect form inside the widget.

forceDemo.description: When true, force demo data even if a PAT is stored.

tools.name: connect_azure_devops
tools.title: Connect Azure DevOps
tools.description: Validate and store an Azure DevOps Personal Access Token to enable live data in the dashboard.

pat.description: Personal Access Token with Work Items (Read), Code (Read), Build (Read) scopes.

tools.name: disconnect_azure_devops
tools.title: Disconnect Azure DevOps
tools.description: Clear the stored Azure DevOps credentials so the dashboard returns to demo mode.
